def negative_monolithic_common_package_becomes_transitive_dependency_for_most_modules():
    rule_id = "monolithic_common_package_becomes_transitive_dependency_for_most_modules"
    family = "packaging"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag package designs where one vague common package becomes a hidden dependency hub."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
